steps.title: Interpret the radical expression
steps.content:
The equation is $\sqrt[15]{(272n)^8} = (272n)^{30x}$. Rewrite the left side using the rule $\sqrt[k]{a^m} = a^{m/k}$:
$$\sqrt[15]{(272n)^8} = (272n)^{8/15}$$
Both sides now have the same base $(272n)$, so the exponents must be equal.

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 30:
$$x = \frac{8}{15} \cdot \frac{1}{30} = \frac{8}{450} = \frac{4}{225}$$
The answer is 4/225.
